---
name: Suggest a layer / provider
about: Propose adding a new map layer service to the repository
labels: suggestion
---

## Provider

**Name:**
**URL:**
**Access:** free / api-key / paid / registration
**License:**
**Categories:** (e.g. weather, satellite, general-purpose)
**Region:** (world / europe / netherlands / …)

## Layer(s)

For each layer, provide:

- **Title:**
- **Type:** raster / vector / wms / wmts / wfs / geojson / mvt
- **Tile URL template:** (include `{z}/{x}/{y}`, use `{key-providername}` for API key placeholder)
- **Max zoom:**
- **Attribution:**
- **Notes:** (known issues, rate limits, tile size, etc.)

## Additional context

(Why is this layer useful? What does it show? Any caveats?)
